restart:
Call pwd. Read the following files before doing anything else: - progress.md (current state, what was last completed) - todo.md (pending tasks and priorities) - [your main script file(s)]
Then run a quick self-check: 1. Summarize where we are in one paragraph 2. List the next 3 concrete tasks in priority order 3. Flag any unresolved decisions or open risks
Do not write any code or suggest changes until I confirm the summary is accurate.
